hero.title: Build The World's First AI Health Companion Together
hero.subtitle: Join our community-funded AI health project. Your contribution helps us build AI models, train medical knowledge systems, develop apps, and make personalized health guidance accessible to everyone.
hero.subtitleNew: AI-powered health guidance for everyone. Support patients battling major illnesses through our medical treatment fund. 100% transparent crypto donations.

medicalFund.title: Help Save Lives with Crypto Donations
medicalFund.subtitle: Support patients battling major illnesses. Every donation goes directly to funding life-saving medical treatments. 100% transparent, 100% on-chain.
medicalFund.storiesSubtitle: Watch their stories. Every patient has been verified by our team. Your donation directly funds their treatment.
medicalFund.donateSubtitle: Each patient has a unique donation wallet address. Click 'Copy' on any patient card above to donate directly.
medicalFund.verifiedDesc: This wallet is managed by SynoChain AI. 100% of donations are used exclusively for patient medical treatment at our partner facilities. All transactions are on-chain and fully transparent.
medicalFund.afterDonating: After donating: Contact us at our company email to receive your donor certificate and fundraising qualification. You can help raise funds for specific patients.
medicalFund.step1Desc: Patients record a video sharing their story and send it to our company email for review.
medicalFund.step2Desc: Our medical team verifies the patient's condition, medical records, and treatment plan.
medicalFund.step3Desc: Verified patient stories are published on our platform. Donors can watch videos and contribute.
medicalFund.step4Desc: Funds are released directly to SynoChain AI partner medical facilities for patient treatment. No cash withdrawals.
medicalFund.importantNote: Important: All raised funds can only be used for medical treatment at SynoChain AI partner facilities. We guarantee 100% of donations reach the patients.
medicalFund.applyTitle: Are You or a Loved One in Need?
medicalFund.applySubtitle: If you are battling a major illness and need financial help for treatment, you can apply for our medical fund program.
medicalFund.applyStep1: Record a short video (2-5 minutes) telling your story
medicalFund.applyStep2: Send the video to our email with your medical records
medicalFund.applyStep3: Our team will review and contact you within 5 business days
medicalFund.faq1Q: How do I know the patients are real?
medicalFund.faq1A: Every patient is verified by our medical team. We review medical records, speak with treating physicians, and confirm the diagnosis before publishing any story.
medicalFund.faq2Q: Where exactly does my donation go?
medicalFund.faq2A: 100% of your donation goes directly to the patient's medical treatment at SynoChain AI partner medical facilities. Funds are never withdrawn as cash.
medicalFund.faq3Q: Can I fundraise for a specific patient?
medicalFund.faq3A: Yes! After making a donation, contact us at our company email to receive fundraising qualification.
medicalFund.faq4A: We accept ETH, USDT (ERC-20), USDC (ERC-20), and BTC. All transactions are recorded on the blockchain.

home.aiAssistantDesc: Get personalized health guidance powered by AI, trained on medical knowledge and constantly updated.
home.founderSubtitle: Be part of the founding community. Support the project and unlock exclusive benefits.
home.fundUsageSubtitle: Full transparency on how your contributions are used to build the platform.
home.toolsSubtitle: Comprehensive AI-powered health tools and knowledge library at your fingertips.
home.architectureSubtitle: A modular, scalable system designed for global health knowledge
home.medicalFundTitle: Help Save Lives with Crypto Donations

ai.title: AI Health Assistant
ai.subtitle: Describe your symptoms and get AI-powered health guidance
ai.placeholder: Describe your symptoms... e.g. I have a headache and feel tired
ai.disclaimer: This AI assistant provides general health information only and is not a substitute for professional medical advice. Always consult a qualified healthcare provider for medical concerns.
ai.feature1Desc: Describe your symptoms in natural language and get instant AI-powered analysis
ai.feature2Desc: AI identifies possible causes and related medical conditions
ai.feature3Desc: Get actionable next steps and know when to seek professional care
ai.feat1Desc: Advanced AI models analyze your symptoms using medical knowledge databases
ai.feat2Desc: Trained on comprehensive medical literature and disease databases
ai.feat3Desc: Get tailored recommendations based on your specific situation
ai.feat4Desc: AI identifies red-flag symptoms that need immediate medical attention

footer.tagline: Building the world's first AI health companion, together.

faq.a1: SynoChain AI is a community-funded AI health companion platform that combines AI technology with comprehensive medical knowledge to provide personalized health guidance.
faq.q2: How does the AI Health Assistant work?
faq.a2: Our AI assistant uses advanced language models trained on medical knowledge to analyze your symptoms and provide possible factors, related conditions, and suggested next steps.
faq.a3: Yes, we take privacy seriously. All health data is encrypted and stored securely. You control your data and can delete it at any time.
faq.q4: What's the difference between AI Pioneer and Lifetime Founder?
faq.a4: AI Pioneer ($29) gives you 1 year of AI Health Assistant access, while Lifetime Founder ($199) provides permanent access plus exclusive benefits like NFT certificates and voting rights.
faq.q5: When will the mobile app be available?
faq.a5: We're developing iOS and Android apps. Founder members will get priority access to beta testing once available.

content.aiAssessmentDesc: Get personalized health guidance with our AI-powered assessment tool.
